rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash's conversion for '20' shillings. The image clearly shows '20' in the shillings column, which violates the rule (shillings must be < 20). As per the rule that 20 shillings = 1 pound, this has been converted to 1£ 0s 0d. gemini-flash correctly identified this issue in its notes and performed the conversion. Description corrected from 'Much?' to 'Much^t' based on visual verification.
